name: Grilled Loin of Pork with Tart Cherry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Boneless pork loin roast, fat trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork loin roast with salt and pepper.
2. Place the roast on a rack in a roasting pan.
3. Insert a meat thermometer into the center of the meat.
4. Roast at 325°F until the thermometer reads 170°F, about 2 hours.
5. In a medium saucepan, heat red wine, orange juice, shallots, garlic, ginger root, allspice, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper to boiling.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
7. Return the mixture to a boil.
8. Mix cornstarch with cold water in a separate bowl.
9. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the saucepan.
10. Boil until thickened.
11. Add cherries and cook over low heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
12. Remove from heat and let cool for 2 to 3 minutes.
13. Stir in NutraSweet.
14. Slice the pork and arrange on a platter.
15. Serve with Cherry Sauce.
NOTE: Tart Cherry Sauce is also excellent served with venison or other game.
Makes 12 servings.
NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION
Serving Size: 1/12 recipe (approx. 4 oz. meat)
Calories..........315
Saturated Fat.....5 g
Protein..........33 g
Cholesterol.....90 mg
Carbohydrates.....9 g
Fiber............<1 g
Total Fat........16 g
Sodium..........99 mg
DIABETIC FOOD EXCHANGE: 4 lean meat, 1 fat, 1/2 fruit
